title: Doctoral Programs

Doctoral Programs

Nutrition and Dietetics

Okan Homepage

Nutrition and Dietetics

MENU

This program is designed to fullfil the needs and expectations of the graduates by taking into consideration all recent developments and achievements in the field of nutrition and dietetics. As the students will acquire a doctorate degree which allows them to work in academic world they also get all necessary knowledge and practical training the position requires. After completing the courses the students prepare a doctorate thesis which gives them an opportunity to express themselves by doing a research in the field of nutrition and dietetics.
